about.tagline: Discover the heart of Africa, an incredible experience
about.aboutText1: Welcome to TourismDRC, your gateway to discovering the beauty, culture, and adventure of the Democratic Republic of Congo.
about.aboutText2: We are dedicated to promoting the DRC as a unique travel destination, showcasing its breathtaking landscapes, rich wildlife, vibrant cultures, and unforgettable experiences. From majestic mountains and stunning rivers to national parks and diverse cities, TourismDRC is here to inspire travellers and provide reliable information for exploring this remarkable country.
about.missionText: Our mission is to promote sustainable tourism in the Democratic Republic of Congo by highlighting its natural wonders, cultural heritage, and local communities while encouraging responsible and ethical travel. We also aim to make travel easier and more accessible for visitors, whether they are traveling for vacation, business, research, or other purposes.
about.offer1_desc: Complete packages including accommodation, transport, activities and assistance
about.offer2_desc: Expert guides and detailed information on all destinations
about.offer3_desc: Discover national parks and wildlife experiences
about.offer4_desc: Cultural immersion and Congolese heritage discovery
about.offer5_desc: Travel tips and safety information for a peaceful stay
about.offer6_desc: Resources tailored for business and leisure travel
about.why1_desc: Authentic and up-to-date information on all our destinations
about.why2: Focus on sustainable and responsible tourism
about.why2_desc: Strong commitment to sustainable and responsible tourism
about.why3: Helpful resources to simplify trip planning
about.why3_desc: Practical resources to facilitate your trip planning
about.why4: Passion for showcasing Congo's hidden gems
about.why4_desc: Passion for revealing Congo's hidden treasures
about.visionText: We envision the Democratic Republic of Congo becoming one of Africa's top eco-tourism and business-friendly destinations, where tourism supports conservation, local communities, and economic growth.
about.contactText: Have questions or want to collaborate with us?

home.welcome: Your gateway to excellence in the DRC.
home.intro: Your trusted partner for exploring the wonders of the DRC. We create unique travel experiences combining adventure, culture, and absolute safety.
home.feature1_desc: Total immersion thanks to our intimate mastery of the territory and its best-kept treasures.
home.feature2_desc: Travel with a free mind. Your safety is at the heart of our protocols, at every moment.
home.feature3_desc: Exclusive journeys, crafted to turn your desires for escape into everlasting memories.
home.servicesIntro: Comprehensive services for a worry-free journey
home.service1_short: Personalized pick-up as soon as you arrive
home.service2_short: Selection of quality hotels and lodges
home.packagesIntro: Discover our most requested packages to explore the DRC
home.package1_desc: The essentials for a first immersion: comfort, flexibility, and discovery of must-see highlights.
home.package2_desc: A perfect balance of culture, nature, and superior comfort with VIP services.
home.package3_desc: The ultimate experience: 24/7 support, luxury vehicle, and exclusive tailor-made services.
home.testimonialsEmpty: Testimonials from our satisfied clients will be available soon.

standard.name: Standard Package
standard.description: Ideal for a first immersion in the country, this package combines comfort and flexibility to explore the must-see highlights.
standard.itinerary: Guided city tour, Excursion to a national park or cultural site, Free time for personal exploration
standard.item4: 2 free activities (e.g., museum visit, city walk)

silver.name: Silver Package
silver.description: An enhanced experience for travelers seeking a blend of comfort, culture, and adventure, with premium services.
silver.itinerary: Cultural discovery (museums, historical sites), Gastronomy day (local specialties tasting), Nature excursion (national park or reserve)
silver.item3: 3 free activities (e.g., guided tour, cultural workshop)
silver.item5: Personal driver for 3 days (standard or premium vehicle)
silver.secInfo2: Access to a secure travel app

gold.name: Gold Package
gold.description: The ultimate experience for discerning travelers, featuring exclusive services and fully customized support.
gold.itinerary: Premium gastronomic experience, Private excursion (safari, hiking, or activity on request)
gold.item1: Airport welcome and transfer in a premium vehicle
gold.item2: 4–5 star hotel accommodation (breakfast and dinner included)
